title: Dream Job
excerpt: All I want is a job that lets me keep an eye on things
body:
All I want is a job that lets me keep an eye on things
I can watch fishermen prepare their ships before they go out to sea
or I could observe a teacher find joy in showing the youth new and exciting discoveries
I'd watch a paramedic save a life as the siren rings

Or a dancer spin around a pole collecting cash
Watching all the fools smiling
I'd sit by as a priest reads the same book for the one hundredth time
and watch his face light up as he somehow finds a new meaning

The line cooks that chop for hours on end would have my attention
As would the writer who can't put down their pen until some of this world makes a bit more sense

All I want is a job that lets me keep an eye on things
I could sit at a bar and watch the sad man drink
for in that case I'd not only keep an eye on him but maybe provide some company

All I want is a job that lets me keep an eye on things
so when I lay my head down to rest
I could think of all of you and not me
